# UiPath.Telemetry.Client

> activity catalog — fetch a version JSON to get all data needed for XAML generation

## Versions

- [2.9.1](2.9.1.json)
- [2.6.1](2.6.1.json)
- [2.5.26](2.5.26.json)
- [2.3.3](2.3.3.json)
- [2.1.3](2.1.3.json)
- [1.6.69](1.6.69.json)
- [1.5.3](1.5.3.json)
- [1.3.12](1.3.12.json)
- [1.2.20](1.2.20.json)
- [1.0.0](1.0.0.json)
